insights.title: 2 trips below ₹18,181 break-even
insights.impact: Guaranteed loss after diesel + expenses. Reject these loads.

insights.title: 56% revenue from "நெல்"
insights.impact: Rate cuts or seasonal dip in this cargo = fleet-wide hit

insights.title: Kumar: 8 trips, ZERO F-tier
insights.impact: Model this behavior for the other driver

actions.title: Push loads from 88% to 95% capacity
actions.detail: Avg 24.2T on 27.5T capacity. Wait 1 extra day for full truck vs leaving 20% empty.

actions.title: Convert 3 F-tier trips to C-tier minimum
actions.detail: Use the phone formula: (Revenue - ₹17,500) ÷ Days. Below ₹2,000/day → reject and wait.

actions.title: Recover 35 idle days between trips
actions.detail: Each idle day = ₹3,742 lost. Pre-book return loads.

actions.title: Book 2 backhaul trips per month
actions.detail: Trucks return empty from destination. Even a C-tier backhaul load beats driving empty.
